combined_text: How to Tell the Difference Between a Fully-Cooked Smoked Ham & a Cook-Before-Eating Ham How to Tell the Difference Between a Fully-Cooked Smoked Ham & a Cook-Before-Eating Hamby LAURA REYNOLDS Oct. 03, 2017Around the holidays, butchers’ cases contain a variety of hams, some pricey and some inexpensive.
